title: Samsung's Galaxy Watch 9 is a gentle evolution of its predecessor - Engadget
summary: Last year, Samsung redesigned the Galaxy Watch with a smaller profile and even greater focus on health and wellness monitoring . Samsung says the new system-on-chip will boost the watch's speed and efficiency, especially for its health-monitoring features.
